title: calamagrostis epigejos f. abbreviata
intro: Calamagrostis epigejos f. abbreviata, also known as a variety of the purple meadow-grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Eastern European folk medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Calamagrostis epigejos f. abbreviata include its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever, as well as its antiseptic properties which can aid in wound healing. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve making infusions or decoctions from the leaves or roots, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
